title: Analysis of RNA polymerase II degradation upon transcription inhibition
author: Lennart Hilbert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set assesses the degradation of RNA polymerase II in zebrafish embryos. Polymerase was labeled by immunofluorescence, microscopy images were acquired by instant-SIM micrscopy, and analyzed using MatLab scripts and the bioformats importer. This data set contains the raw image data as well as all further analysis scripts.
steps_raw: This data set assesses the degradation of RNA polymerase II in zebrafish embryos.
